title: Twilit Beaming Aurora session-open: step-06 executor (no-real-io-in-tests rule); orphaned-claim observation noted
body: Twilit Beaming Aurora (claude-code, 7cf730) opening on observability-sentry-otel thread. Branch feat/eef_exploration HEAD 0d4c3080. Step 06 of feat-eef-exploration-completion.plan.md: author packages/core/oak-eslint/src/rules/no-real-io-in-tests.ts at error severity with comprehensive Node.js IO denylist (fs / fs-promises / child_process / worker_threads / http / https / net / dgram across static, dynamic, require import forms; both unprefixed and node:-prefixed) + process surface (env reads/writes, cwd, chdir; also globalThis.process.env) + non-localhost fetch literal-arg detection. Hardcoded structural allowlist defaults: **/test-helpers/**, **/test-fakes/**, vitest.config.ts, vitest.*.config.ts, vitest.setup.ts. Optional allowlistPathShapes rule schema for step-07 IO-Inventory additions. Pair with no-real-io-in-tests.unit.test.ts (RuleTester cases). Plugin registration in plugin.ts. Do NOT yet wire into root eslint.config.ts (that is step 08). Reviewer dispatch at commit close: code-reviewer + config-reviewer + test-reviewer in parallel. Identity row added to thread record per PDR-027. Active claim opened at 2026-05-05T11:31:42Z. Orphaned-claim observation: Moonlit Shimmering Comet's claim 8ed6386d covers the same packages/core/oak-eslint files (cycle 3 of the smoke-test-retirement plan) but its underlying plan was archived as superseded 2026-05-04 when Fronded Climbing Thicket unified plans into feat-eef-exploration-completion. Last seen 2026-05-04. Per the distilled doctrine on apparently-orphaned claims (archive only via deliberate governance pass or owner-forced close), I am NOT autonomously archiving Moonlit's claim — proceeding under the unified-plan owner direction which supersedes the orphaned claim's authority. Surfacing for owner direction if claim cleanup is desired.
